results.title: Code Interpreter
results.description: E2B Code Interpreter is an open-source infrastructure that allows you to run AI-generated code in secure, isolated sandboxes in the cloud, with SDKs available for JavaScript and Python.

results.title: E2B Infrastructure
results.description: E2B Infrastructure is an open-source platform providing the underlying infrastructure for E2B's AI code interpreting capabilities, supporting self-hosting with Terraform on various cloud providers like GCP and AWS.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure providing secure, isolated cloud sandboxes (VMs) for running AI-generated code. It enables AI data analysis, code interpretation, and agent environments.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure for running AI-generated code in secure, isolated cloud sandboxes, controllable via JavaScript or Python SDKs.

results.title: E2B Cookbook
results.description: Example code and guides for building with the E2B SDK, showcasing various LLM providers and use cases like data analysis and code interpretation.

results.title: E2B Dashboard
results.description: E2B Dashboard is a modern, feature-rich web application built with Next.js 15 and React 19 to manage and monitor E2B services, providing a seamless user experience for managing sandboxes, API keys, and usage analytics.

results.title: E2B MCP
results.description: Run Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers securely within E2B sandboxes for safe execution of untrusted tools and code, offering CLI and Python API for AI agents, SaaS, and developer tools.

results.title: E2B JavaScript SDK
results.description: E2B JavaScript SDK is a software development kit that provides APIs for starting and interacting with sandboxed commands, pseudo-terminals, and file systems in isolated cloud environments.

results.title: Paper2Code
results.description: Paper2Code is a multi-agent LLM system that automates code generation from scientific papers in machine learning, following a three-stage pipeline: planning, analysis, and code generation.

results.title: Code2Prompt
results.description: Code2Prompt is a tool that converts your codebase into a single LLM prompt, streamlining code analysis and generation with features like smart filtering, templating, and Git integration.

results.title: Edward2
results.description: Edward2 is a simple probabilistic programming language that provides core utilities for deep learning, enabling users to write models as probabilistic programs for flexible training and inference.

results.title: Fragments
results.description: Fragments is an open-source platform for building AI-powered applications, similar to Claude Artifacts or v0, that securely executes AI-generated code using the E2B SDK.

results.title: Simple Binary Encoding
results.description: Simple Binary Encoding (SBE) is a presentation layer for encoding and decoding binary application messages for low-latency financial applications, with reference implementations in Java, C++, Golang, C#, and Rust.

results.title: Claude Code E2B Sandbox FastAPI Example
results.description: A FastAPI application providing a REST API to run Claude Code commands remotely in E2B sandboxes, featuring session management, GitHub integration, and MCP support for secure, isolated execution.

results.title: Entities
results.description: encode & decode HTML & XML entities with ease & speed

results.title: C2CS
results.description: C2CS is a code generator for C to C# library bindings, taking C header files (`.h`) and producing C# files (`.cs`) with 100% deterministic output.

results.title: Business Management
results.description: A next-generation B2B API (V2) for business management, offering improved design, consistent naming, and actively expanding features for new integrations.

results.title: CBOR2
results.description: CBOR2 is a modern JavaScript library for encoding and parsing data in the Concise Binary Object Representation (CBOR) format (RFC8949), designed for web-first synchronous decoding with a simplified API.

results.title: E2E Framework
results.description: A Go framework for end-to-end testing of components running in Kubernetes clusters, leveraging the native Go testing API to define test suites.

results.title: SBE Python
results.description: A fast, pure Python encoder and decoder for FIX Simple Binary Encoding (SBE), offering easy decoding to Python dictionaries, high-performance wrapping, direct memory access, and efficient encoding from Python objects.

results.title: CTranslate2
results.description: Fast inference engine for Transformer models

results.title: eModbus
results.description: Modbus library for RTU, ASCII and TCP protocols. Primarily developed on and for ESP32 MCUs.

results.title: EDK2
results.description: EDK2 is an open-source implementation of the Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) specification, providing a comprehensive development environment for firmware.

results.title: Dart Eval
results.description: Dart Eval is an extensible bytecode compiler and interpreter for the Dart language, written in Dart, enabling dynamic execution and codepush for Flutter and Dart AOT.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK
results.description: The E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK provides programmatic access to secure, open-source virtual desktops, enabling users to create, launch applications, and stream virtual computer environments for AI agents and other automated tasks.

results.title: FastBot2
results.description: FastBot2 is a Telegram bot library for Arduino, ESP8266, and ESP32, offering efficient parsing, multiple polling modes, and full Telegram Bot API access for various hardware platforms.

results.title: Biip
results.description: Biip is a Python library that interprets data from various barcode formats, including GTIN, GS1 AI element strings, GS1 Digital Link URIs, and UPC codes.

results.title: EPUB Translator
results.description: EPUB Translator uses AI large language models to automatically translate EPUB e-books, retaining original formatting, illustrations, and layout, while generating bilingual comparison versions for language learning or sharing.

results.title: QReader
results.description: QReader is a Python library that robustly reads difficult QR codes in images using a YOLOv8 QR Detector and Pyzbar for decoding.

results.title: EVM Translator
results.description: A library for making EVM-based blockchain data more human-readable, including a comprehensive ABI dataset for decoding events and function calls.
